text:
Created attachment 210278
homura.diff

Update to 3.3

- Fixed audio for The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut.

- When installing applications, there is now more output in the commandline, e.g. why a corresponding tweak is used.

- A hint before Clone Hero gets installed appears now, how to get the guitar hero guitars working on FreeBSD.
